title: Junior Revenue Manager at Compass Group India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Compass Group India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Compass Group India Digital Technologies in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Compass Group India Digital Technologies:
Compass Group India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India Digital Technologies!
